features.claim: Antigravity provides a panel to monitor background subagents running concurrently.
features.name: Agent Manager Panel

features.claim: Antigravity supports a planning mode that generates multi-turn plans for complex engineering tasks.
features.name: Multi-turn plan generation mode

features.claim: Antigravity supports loading and browsing local and global Agent Skills as plugins.
features.name: Agent Skills

features.claim: Antigravity includes a built-in MCP server manager for integrating external context providers.
features.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server manager

features.claim: Antigravity offers configurable global safety presets controlling when the agent prompts for approval before using tools.
features.name: Tool permission presets

features.claim: Antigravity provides a dedicated panel for reviewing and approving code artifacts before they are written.
features.name: Artifact Review Panel
